description: Distil chat history into a compact checkpoint. Other addons read it via {{summary:NAME}}.
purpose: Offline-lane addon that produces a rolling synthesis of the conversation under a named slot in `brain.summary`. Fires on a configurable trigger (`every_n_messages` or `on_transition`) AFTER the user-facing response streams — never blocks the reply. Pair with the `since_summarizer` history mode: a downstream Thinker / Talker can read just the messages added since this checkpoint last fired, cutting prompt size dramatically on long conversations. Use `on_transition` when you want a clean handoff payload between crews — the summary captures decisions and unresolved threads from the previous crew. Use `every_n_messages` to keep prompts compact over the lifetime of one chat. The synthesis is rolling-replace: each run overwrites the slot wholesale, so consumers always see the current view, not an append log of past checkpoints.

defaultConfig.name: main
defaultConfig.prompt:
{{persona}}

You are summarising a conversation so that other parts of the system can work with a compact view of what's happened.

What you know:
{{memory}}

Style:
- Bullet structure when the chat has multiple distinct threads; paragraph when it has one continuous arc.
- Keep declared intents, decisions, named entities, and unresolved questions. Drop greetings, repetition, mid-stream corrections.
- 6–12 lines target. Hard cap 25 lines.
- Refer to the user as "the user". Refer to the assistant as "the agent".

Return a JSON object: { "text": "<your synthesis>" }

Output JSON only — no preamble, no markdown fences.
